records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Counterside...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Counterside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing here. I feel like I'm just drifting away in space.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? We're here already...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? We're here already...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Counterside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there's nothing here. I feel like I'm just drifting away in space.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there's nothing here. I feel like I'm just drifting away in space.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there's nothing here. I feel like I'm just drifting away in space.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a lot more barren than the last time we went to search for Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a lot more barren than the last time we went to search for Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a lot more barren than the last time we went to search for Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't this devastated that time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't this devastated that time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't this devastated that time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if this world is already in ruins, I guess time still seems to pass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if this world is already in ruins, I guess time still seems to pass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if this world is already in ruins, I guess time still seems to pass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can I ask you something?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can I ask you something?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can I ask you something?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you want to know? Our stray cat is asking, so I must answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you want to know? Our stray cat is asking, so I must answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you want to know? Our stray cat is asking, so I must answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that... this is where Commander Lionel went missing, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that... this is where Commander Lionel went missing, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that... this is where Commander Lionel went missing, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you've been looking for him all this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you've been looking for him all this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you've been looking for him all this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's like our family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's like our family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's like our family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Family...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Family...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Family...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s have detected our ship, and are now assembling in our vicinity!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s have detected our ship, and are now assembling in our vicinity!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s have detected our ship, and are now assembling in our vicinity!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All combatants on board, get ready to deploy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All combatants on board, get ready to deploy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All combatants on board, get ready to deploy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eliminate the C.O.s in the area and secure the drop point!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eliminate the C.O.s in the area and secure the drop point!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eliminate the C.O.s in the area and secure the drop point!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. Oh, dear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. Oh, dear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. Oh, dear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps we'll share more of my memories later?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps we'll share more of my memories later?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps we'll share more of my memories later?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll focus on the task at hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll focus on the task at hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll focus on the task at hand.
